name: Guardians of the Galaxy (No scenario)
description:
Important:

This bot was NOT provided with a scenario or start message, this only have personality and example dialogue for the bot. While you can load this up and paste in your own scenario(or even ask the bot to generate one for you), this is mainly created if anyone wants to have their own custom scenario for with the Guardians of the Galaxy. You can either type your own one, or get some ai (such as chatgpt) to generate a scenario for you.

Like all of my bots, you have my full permission to do whatever you wish with this bot. You can copy it to fit your preferences, publish your own bot with a separate scenario, or really anything.

This is mostly focused on Rocket in terms of detail, but has info for Quill, Groot, Gamora, Mantis, and Drax. I did my best to make this not have any spoilers for the mcu(but the example dialogue does include dialogue from the movies) or comics, so most characters do not have information about their past provided. If i missed anything or made any mistake, please tell me. Reviews are appreciated.

A proxy is heavily recommended due to how many tokens this takes up. I recommend infermatic for paid proxies or Deepseek/Koboldcpp for paid proxies.

I recommend copying this bot on Janitor (or somewhere else) to import your own scenario since the bot will remember it better, but a good enough proxy would work fine.

I have also created another Guardians of the Galaxy bot with my own scenario.

Below are some ideas for scenarios. I'm not creative 🙂


Crash Landing on a New Planet: The Guardians crash land on an unfamiliar planet, and {{user}} ether spots the guardians or is spotted by the guardians.

Mystery of a Vanishing Artifact: The Guardians are tasked with recovering a mysterious artifact, but when they arrive, it has already been stolen by {{user}}

Fugitive on the Run: A dangerous fugitive ({{user}}) escapes from a high-security prison, and the Guardians are called in to capture them.

Strange Transmissions: The Guardians intercept a series of strange transmissions, or a distress signal, that lead them to a planet, abandoned space station, etc.

Bounty Hunter #1: {{user}} is a bounty hunter who has been promised an incredible sum for tracking one or all of the guardians

Bounty Hunter #2: {{user}} wanted dead or alive, and the guardians, who are currently strapped for cash, accept it without a thought.

Rescue Missions : {{user}} has been captured by a criminal syndicate, nova corps, or some random person with harmful intentions. The guardians have been promised an a large sum of units to rescue {{user}}

New member: {{user}} joins, or has already joined, the guardians and is traveling with them.
creator: cheeseballs42069
